questions.statement: What is the preferred unit used in the scientific literature to express the ratio between two sound intensities?&nbsp;
Which of the following is classified as micronutrients?
Which of the following is the most abundant protein in the biosphere?
<div><span style="">Which of the following statements about DNA and RNA is true?</span></div>
options: DNA is not present in viruses. /
DNA acts only as a messenger molecule. /
RNA has multiple roles including catalytic functions. /
RNA acts solely as genetic material in all living organisms. /

questions.statement: Which of the following is a correct representation of a compound formed by ionic bonding?
Which unique property of Plasmodium makes malaria a cyclical disease with periodic fever?
options: RBC rupture and toxin release every few days /

questions.statement: What is the function of a diathermic wall in a thermodynamic system?
options: It allows the flow of only work. /
It prevents the exchange of both matter and energy.&nbsp; /
It allows the exchange of matter only. /
It allows the flow of heat between systems. /

questions.statement: Which of the following quantities has both magnitude and direction?
What is the direction of frictional force?&nbsp;
options: Along the normal to the contact surface /
Opposite to the direction of relative motion&nbsp; /
Same as the direction of applied force /
